highlights.text: Its why I wrote on December 20th: “My general lean is that ES can make its way up to the back-test of 6099”.
I then wrote on Christmas Eve: “The obvious zone to try shorts would be the 6098 major backtest zone”.

There were numerous setups between 6099 and the current lows however, and yesterdays selloff in particular was caused by ES losing a critical support at 5986 which was a major low zone from last Friday.

post_title: Will The New Year Start Off Better For SPX Bulls Than It Ended? Jan 2nd Plan
